PROFILE
AI & Data Engineer with experience on designing and building scalable data pipelines and intelligent systems for healthcare and enterprise automation. Proven track record in applying Python, Machine Learning, and AI to real-world problems, with early experience at Maharashtra Pollution Control Board (MPCB) in data handling and analysis. At CrossAsyst Infotech, contributed to impactful solutions including clinical data processing engines and voice-enabled AI agents. Skilled in modern tools and frameworks like LangChain, n8n, AWS Bedrock, and FHIR standards. Known for a collaborative mindset, proactive problem-solving, and a strong drive for continuous learning and innovation.

Data Engineer
CrossAsyst Infotech
- Contributed to the design and development of an end-to-end AI platform for Fraud, Waste, and Abuse (FWA) detection in insurance claim processing, built using a Kafka-based master -worker microservices architecture , enabling near real-time analysis of multi-stage claim workflows with detection of each claim as Fraud, Waste, Abuse and Normal .
- Designed and implemented a scalable claim ingestion pipeline using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and AWS S3 , supporting API- and emailbased claim intake , and triggering downstream orchestration events, which standardized ingestion for FWA Sheid AI pipelines .
- Architected and developed PDF Master -Worker services using Kafka , enabling parallel document processing with one- document -oneworker execution, improving document throughput by ~3× and supporting horizontal scalability.
- Implemented PDF processing workflows to extract electronic text and embedded images , persisting processed artifacts in AWS S3 , and routing assets to OCR, deduplication, and image forensic pipelines, reducing redundant OCR execution by ~40% and saving the resources and costs
- Designed and implemented a hybrid OCR framework with OCR Master -Worker services With Kafka using PaddleOCR, Qwen/Qwen3VL models, and AWS Textract , enabling dynamic selection based on accuracy, latency, and cost, and improving OCR text quality by ~30% .
- Contributed to AI validation and enrichment services , including document classification, image forensics, medical coding, and summarization , implementing RAG-based ICD/CPT validation (75K+ codes) and LLM fallback mechanisms , improving fraud signal accuracy and system resilience.
- Built secure UI-facing APIs and analytics endpoints using FastAPI , implementing authentication, authorization, and dashboard services backed by warehouse data, enabling analyst-driven investigation and operational monitoring .

Data Engineer
Technologies: Python, Hugging Face, Transformer, FAISS, Sentence-BERT, LangChain, LangGraph, PgVector,API, Docker, AWS Bedrock, ChatGroq, n8n, SQL, NLP, RAG, LLMs, Agentic Workflows

JFA (Junior Field Assistant Analyst's),
Maharashtra Pollution Control Board (MPCB)
- Deployed and maintained Respirable Dust Samplers (RDS) three times per week to monitor ambient air quality, focusing on particulate matter (PM), SO₂, and NOx levels.
- Followed structured sampling protocols, including equipment setup, data collection every three hours, and accurate logging of readings and timestamps.
- Shared responsibility in a rotating field and lab workflow, ensuring operational efficiency and continuous data capture. Conducted gravimetric analysis in the lab by weighing filters and sample cups to quantify airborne particulates.
- Maintained organized digital records in Excel, documenting sample weights, sensor readings, and environmental conditions for compliance and reporting.
- Contributed to environmental assessments and regulatory documentation supporting industrial impact evaluations and pollution control efforts.  Tools  &  Skills: RDS  Instruments, Microsoft Excel, Gravimetric Analys

PostgresSQL, MongoDB, Vector DB(Fassi, Qdrant, pinecone, pgVector, AWS Knowledge Base), Neo4j(Graph Database)

1. Multi-Agent Contract Intelligence Chatbot
Tech stack: Python, FastAPI, LangGraph, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS Bedrock (LLMs + KB), Qdrant (vector DB), S3, MPC
Developed a multi-agent chatbot leveraging LangGraph, PostgreSQL, AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base, and Qdrant vector search to process contract-related queries from both structured SQL data and unstructured documents . Integrated Model Context Protocol (MCP) to standardize context exchange between agents and tools, enabling modular and interoperable agent workflows . Designed an intelligent supervisor-agent architecture with automatic query routing , SQL-to-KB fallback , and parallel agent execution , which improved query resolution accuracy by 30% and reduced response latency by 40% . Implemented real-time streaming (SSE) , API key -based authentication , and session management to support secure, scalable multi-user deployments .
keywords:
multi-agent contract intelligence chatbot
tech stack

chunks.raw_text:
2. Face Analysis and Similarity Search System
Tech Stack: Python, InsightFace, RetinaFace, ResNet50, MongoDB, NumPy, OpenCV, FastAPI
Developed a face detection and analysis system using RetinaFace for  real-time face detection  and InsightFace (ResNet50) for feature embedding, age, and gender prediction. Integrated with MongoDB for storing  facial  vectors  and  enabled high- accuracy similarity search using cosine similarity. Achieved 98% face detection accuracy , >92% age/gender classification accuracy ,  and enabled sub-second similarity search across a database of 10K+ embeddings, reducing face match time by 80% and improving identity verification workflows.
headings: 2. Face Analysis and Similarity Search System
keywords: a face detection and analysis system

analysis and similarity search system
tech stack

chunks.raw_text:
3. Criteria Chatbot
Tech stack: Python, FAISS, SQL, RAG, Vector DB, modular agent-based design
Built a modular chatbot system in Python to process user queries with SQL database integration , retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) , and semantic search (FAISS vector DB) . Implemented specialized agents for query splitting, SQL handling, and knowledge retrieval , improving accuracy for complex database interactions. Designed extensible architecture with prompt-driven agents and utility tools for database operations and advanced query handling

4. FHIR Chatbot
Tech stack: Python, FastAPI, OpenAI GPT-3.5/4, FHIR (HL7), SQLite, Watchdog, Hapi
Designed and implemented a FHIR-compliant chatbot for healthcare eligibility verification, integrating FastAPI , LLMs (llama) ,  and FHIR JSON data ingestion with ETL process. Automated patient search, eligibility checks, and data validation with a local SQLite backend and real-time monitoring using Watchdog . Achieved >90% accuracy , reduced eligibility check time from 5 minutes to under 1 minute ,  and decreased validation errors by 70% ,  improving both efficiency and reliability for healthcare providers. Integrated AWS Nova Sonic for configurable speech-to-text (STT) and text-to-speech (TTS)
AWS Educate Introduction to Generative AI
